# Bundoora Scout Group

Website: https://bundoorascouts.org/
Purpose: Public website for Bundoora Scout Group in Bundoora, Victoria, Australia.
Address: 20 Noorong Ave, Bundoora VIC 3083, Australia.
Contact: https://bundoorascouts.org/contact

## Key Pages

- Home: https://bundoorascouts.org/
- Contact and joining enquiries: https://bundoorascouts.org/contact
- Sections overview: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections
- Joey Scouts: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections/joeys
- Cub Scouts: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections/cubs
- Scouts: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections/scouts
- Venturer Scouts: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections/venturers
- Rover Scouts: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections/rovers
- Adult volunteers: https://bundoorascouts.org/sections/adult
- About Scouting: https://bundoorascouts.org/scouting
- Costs and uniform: https://bundoorascouts.org/scouting/costs-and-uniform
- Child safety: https://bundoorascouts.org/scouting/child-safety
- Hall hire: https://bundoorascouts.org/about/hall-hire
- Leaders: https://bundoorascouts.org/about/our-leaders
- Campfire news: https://bundoorascouts.org/the-campfire/

## Notes

Bundoora Scout Group is a local Scout group run by volunteers. The site provides practical information for families, youth members, leaders, volunteers, hall hire visitors, sponsors, and the local community.
